transcription.text: You can ask the flowers, I sit for hours Telling all the blue birds, the billy coo birds Pretty little baby, I'm so in love with you Now is just the time while both of us are young Puppy love must have its day Don't you know it's much more fun to love While the heart is young and gay Meet me at the car hop or at the pop shop
